description: The LinearAngleMapper component is used to map a float range to a rotation range using lerp.

fields.Source: The source value field to get the source mapped value from.
fields.Target: The rotation to drive with the mapped rotation value.
fields.SourceMin: The minimum value for ``Source`` for mapping.
fields.SourceMax: The maximum value for ``Source`` for mapping.
fields.TargetMin: The minumum rotation value when ``Source`` is at ``SourceMin``'s value.
fields.TargetMax: The maximum rotation value when ``Source`` is at ``SourceMax``'s value.
fields.AllowReverseMapping: Whether changes to ``Target`` map in the reverse direction and get applied to target. See write backs.
fields.Clamp: Whether to allow extrapolation of the lerped data or to keep it within the values specified.
